name: tms-grep
description: Everything Search とファイル内検索を組み合わせた Windows 向け GUI 全文検索アプリ

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run copy:renderer
scripts.test:config-store: npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-electron-test.mjs scripts/test-config-store.mjs
scripts.test:es-args: npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-electron-test.mjs scripts/test-es-args.mjs
scripts.test:content-search: node scripts/create-fixtures.mjs && npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-electron-test.mjs scripts/test-content-search.mjs
scripts.test:search-job: node scripts/create-fixtures.mjs && npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-electron-test.mjs scripts/test-search-job.mjs
scripts.test:ui: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-test.mjs scripts/test-ui.mjs
scripts.test: node --test scripts/test-placeholder.mjs && npm run test:config-store && npm run test:es-args && npm run test:content-search && npm run test:search-job && npm run test:env-resolver && npm run test:copy-format && npm run test:copy-text-transform && npm run test:update-error && npm run test:ui

author: TMSystems
